pece_core_loop.input: Raw sensor data (Radar/LiDAR point clouds, spatial tokens)
pece_core_loop.collision_resolved: Isotropic Gaussian assumption vs physical crescent-shaped variance → resolved by heteroscedastic parameterization in polar coordinates (P3-AUF)

pece_core_loop.output: 256-dim topology vector (contact map + persistent homology + interface geometry)
pece_core_loop.collision_resolved: ESM-2 3B semantic richness vs performance degradation → topology at 10x memory compression achieves superior R^2 (P2-STT)

pece_core_loop.input: Raw CoT reasoning trace Z of length N
pece_core_loop.output: Compressed trace Z* preserving high-entropy peaks; L_CIB = I(X;Z) - μ·I(Y;Z|X)
pece_core_loop.collision_resolved: Naive IB violates Markov property in attention → CIB conditions on prompt X to handle non-Markovian dependencies (P5-CIB)

pece_core_loop.input: Latent hypothesis H from topology + CIB
pece_core_loop.output: Empirical validation signal V (laser shock velocity, XRD peaks, nanoindentation load-displacement)
pece_core_loop.collision_resolved: Latent hypothesis unfalsified without physical friction → closed-loop see-move-shoot automation closes hypothesis-to-experiment gap (P6-AGF)

pece_core_loop.output: Causally grounded claim C with cross-attention attribution tensor A
pece_core_loop.collision_resolved: Decoder-only self-attention achieves syntactic perfection but 0.0 causal fidelity → mandatory encoder-decoder cross-attention routing preserves physical attribution (P1-FGD)

hickam_synthesis_records.occam_rejected: Decoder models hallucinate because they are undertrained or need bigger datasets
comorbid_factors: Autoregressive token-by-token inference structurally accumulates local noise
Self-attention cannot distinguish syntactic pattern from causal attribution
Beam search optimizes fluency, not source fidelity
hickam_synthesis_records.abductive_leap: Format-Grounding Dissociation is a structural architectural property, not a data scaling problem; GPT-5.3 class models close the gap only at massive scale and inference cost (arXiv:2512.10561)
hickam_synthesis_records.resolution: Mandatory encoder-decoder cross-attention module as external epistemic grounding layer

hickam_synthesis_records.occam_rejected: Bigger protein language models always produce better representations
comorbid_factors: ESM-2 3B shows performance degradation vs 650M (over-parameterization noise)
Topological features at 256-dim capture interface invariants missed by sequence embeddings
Memory cost of 2560-dim embeddings is 10x greater than 256-dim topology vectors
hickam_synthesis_records.abductive_leap: The Bitter Lesson in protein ML inverts at the topology-semantics boundary: relational connectivity (topology) overrides explicit semantic structure when structural invariants are the target
hickam_synthesis_records.resolution: Dual-world continuous embeddings: ESM-2 for evolutionary context + 256-dim topology for structural prediction

hickam_synthesis_records.occam_rejected: Radar uncertainty is symmetric and uniformly calibrated across measurement space
comorbid_factors: Polar coordinate physics generates radially asymmetric variance
First-order Cartesian projection non-linearly transforms polar ellipsoids into crescent shapes
Doppler velocity provides orthogonal evidence to spatial geometry for ghost-point suppression
hickam_synthesis_records.abductive_leap: Physical sensor measurement spaces are intrinsically anisotropic; any isotropic uncertainty model is structurally misspecified and will produce false positives at multipath interference boundaries
hickam_synthesis_records.resolution: Heteroscedastic Gaussian with separate σ_r (radial) and σ_a (angular) parameters in polar coordinates, fused via BDA

hickam_synthesis_records.occam_rejected: Working memory and long-term memory are implemented by separate, independent systems in AI
comorbid_factors: Biological gamma-band oscillations coordinate neural communication (working memory)
Hebbian plasticity consolidates structurally active pathways (long-term memory)
Phase coherence r(t) in Kuramoto networks provides a natural threshold signal for consolidation
hickam_synthesis_records.abductive_leap: HOC-L provides the first provably convergent artificial system that replicates the biological fast-slow timescale coupling; synchronization-gated plasticity mathematically bridges WM to crystallized topology
hickam_synthesis_records.resolution: Composite Lyapunov function proves joint convergence; O(n*k) complexity makes it practical at scale

probe_calibration_paradox_report.title: Causal Efficacy Paradox: Where Standard Probes Fail
probe_calibration_paradox_report.description: Linear probes achieve high accuracy in identifying internal representations (e.g., 'this layer encodes sentiment') but this correlation is NOT evidence of causal efficacy. A probe can achieve 99% classification accuracy on a feature that has zero causal effect on model output.

documented_edge_cases.scenario: SAE probe identifies 'citation format' direction in residual stream with 97% accuracy
documented_edge_cases.failure_mode: Ablating the identified direction causes no change in hallucinated citation content; the direction encodes format but not source-attribution causality
documented_edge_cases.pece_resolution: Cross-attention causality tensor A maps decoder queries directly to encoder source tokens; ablating encoder source features during beam search causes generation halt (not hallucination), proving causal efficacy

documented_edge_cases.scenario: Topology probe identifies protein binding site with 89% accuracy on test set
documented_edge_cases.failure_mode: Probe trained on ESM-2 embeddings identifies superficial sequence features correlated with binding sites in training distribution; fails under mutation-induced distributional shift
documented_edge_cases.pece_resolution: Topological persistent homology features are invariant to point mutations that preserve contact topology; provides structurally causal (not sequence-correlational) binding site identification

documented_edge_cases.scenario: Attention visualization shows high weight on relevant radar returns
documented_edge_cases.failure_mode: BDA module shows high spatial attention to multipath ghost points (high intensity = high attention); attention is correlated with signal strength, not physical object presence
documented_edge_cases.pece_resolution: Anisotropic uncertainty quantification gates attention weights by physical plausibility (σ_r, σ_a bounds); Doppler coherence cross-check causally validates or rejects spatial detections

adversarial_test_protocol.step_1: Train standard interpretability probe (linear SAE) on PECE internal representations
adversarial_test_protocol.step_2: Identify top-k features with highest probe accuracy
adversarial_test_protocol.step_3: Ablate those features using activation patching
adversarial_test_protocol.step_4: Measure delta in downstream task performance
adversarial_test_protocol.pass_criterion: Features with >90% probe accuracy must produce >20% task performance drop when ablated (causal efficacy confirmed)
adversarial_test_protocol.fail_criterion: High probe accuracy + low ablation impact = Probe Calibration Paradox confirmed → requires cross-attention re-grounding
